next_steps: Perform urgent CSF PCR testing for JCV, VZV, EBV, CMV, HHV-6, and HSV
Send CSF and serum for comprehensive paraneoplastic antibody panel
Consult neurology, infectious disease, and neuro-oncology
Perform high-volume repeat CSF cytology and flow cytometry with consultation for CAR-T cell detection
Serial MRI brain with contrast to monitor for evolving parenchymal enhancement
Consider urgent stereotactic biopsy of the cerebellar lesion if non-invasive workup is negative
